instructions:
1. Enter the main lobby using code 4527# on the keypad.
2. Take the elevator to your floor.
3. Your unit key is in the lockbox on the door — code will be texted to you.
4. WiFi info is posted inside the unit.

Parking is in the rear lot — visitor spots are marked in yellow.
house_rules:
No smoking in units or common areas.
Quiet hours: 10 PM - 8 AM.
No pets without prior written approval.
No parties or events without management approval.
Report any maintenance issues promptly.
Keep common areas clean.
Dispose of trash in designated areas only.
checkout_instructions:
1. Remove all personal belongings.
2. Place used towels in the bathtub.
3. Run the dishwasher if needed.
4. Lock all windows and doors.
5. Return the key to the lockbox.
6. Text management when you've left.
